disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic intermittent foul-smelling, sometimes blood-stained fluid leaking from a small opening in the skin beside the anus for about 3 months
trigger_question_examples: How long has the leaking been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a little opening near my back passage that's been leaking smelly fluid on and off for about three months, and sometimes there's a bit of blood in it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute worsening over 48 hours — the discharge decreased while localised pain, swelling and redness sharply increased (a pattern suggesting the tract has become obstructed and a collection is building)
trigger_question_examples: What has changed in the last couple of days?
Is it draining more or less than before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: That's the strange thing — it's actually been leaking less the last two days, but the whole area has swollen up, gone red and got really painful.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Occasional passage of wind/gas through the external skin opening
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever noticed wind or gas coming out of that opening?
Does anything other than fluid come out of it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, yes — sometimes I feel a bit of wind come out of that little opening, not just from my back passage.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prior spontaneously-drained perianal abscess approximately 6 months ago
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any problems in that area before?
Any previous lumps or abscesses near your back passage?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: About six months ago I had a really painful lump there that eventually burst and drained on its own. I never got it looked at.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Subjective low-grade fever / feeling warm, without rigors or shaking chills
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt feverish or hot and cold?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've felt a bit warm and took my temperature this morning — it was 37.6. I haven't had the proper shakes or shivers though.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pertinent negatives that currently keep this below an emergency: no high fever with rigors, no rapidly spreading redness, no difficulty passing urine, no light-headedness or racing heart
trigger_question_examples: Any high fevers with shaking chills, spreading redness, trouble passing urine, or feeling faint?
Is the redness spreading quickly or is the pain getting dramatically worse by the hour?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — no shaking chills or really high fever, the redness isn't spreading fast, I can pass urine fine, and I don't feel faint or like my heart's racing.
